intent: Uses state_6 xor state_4 instead of the public state_6 xor state_5 feedback relation while preserving enable gating.
Advances the LFSR on every non-reset clock edge instead of holding state while en is low.
Drives serial_out from state_0 instead of the public state_6 bit.

why_wrong: Preserves the exposed LFSR state recurrence but scales serial_out below the public logic threshold.
Loads state_2 from state_0 instead of shifting state_1 into state_2.
